must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Lotus River Foods JSC by Mekong Horizon Capital Fund I, L.P. (VN).
Transaction: subscription for 18% newly issued ordinary shares; pre-money valuation VND 1,250,000,000,000; contemplated listing on Southern Equities Exchange (SEE‑VN) in 2026; information in this term sheet may constitute MNPI under Vietnamese Securities Law.
Conditions precedent: approvals from Vietnam Securities Supervision Agency (VSSA), SEE‑VN admissions committee, and Vietnam Securities Depository & Clearing (VSDC); issuer board and shareholder resolutions; draft prospectus code LRF‑DP‑2026‑07 remains confidential.
Use of proceeds: working capital and cold‑chain expansion in the Mekong Delta; appointment of underwriter pending; no selective disclosure prior to formal public announcement via the issuer CBTT portal and SEE‑VN.
Consideration and funding: VND 225,000,000,000 payable at Closing into escrow at Pacific Meridian Bank JSC, Escrow Account 101‑882‑VN‑LRF; deposit of VND 50,000,000,000 due upon signing; escrow contact: escrow@pacificmeridianbank.vn.
Issuer representative identifiers: Ms. Le Thi Minh Chau (DOB 12/07/1985; age 40), Investor Relations Manager at Lotus River Foods JSC; office: Lotus Park Campus, Block C, Techno Ward, Thu Duc City; work email: chau.le@lotusriverfoods.vn; device: laptop LRF‑IR‑001, serial VN‑LRF‑2019‑IR; VSDC sub‑account LRF‑EM‑9981; internal session ref SEE‑IR‑2026‑0815; extension 2205.
Representations and MNPI: parties acknowledge receipt of non‑public issuer financial and governance information likely to affect price; no trading in LRF shares or related instruments until official disclosure by the issuer via SEE‑VN and VSSA channels; insider list to be maintained by Compliance.
Fees, costs, and accounts: settlement through VSDC participant Saffron Securities Co., Ltd., client code TR‑5578; advisory fee VND 3,000,000,000 payable to Mekong Horizon Capital Advisory Co.; general workforce figures (e.g., 1,200 staff) are non‑identifying.
Employee and banking references: payroll flow‑through for key staff administered via Lotus River Foods payroll sub‑account PR‑4427 at Pacific Meridian Bank; these operational identifiers alone do not identify individuals.
Investor contacts: Mr. Tran Bao Kien, Deal Team Lead, Mekong Horizon Capital Fund I, L.P.; email kien.tran@mekonghorizoncapital.com; meeting venue: Sunwave Tower, Level 12, East Saigon District; tel +84 28 3777 4433.
Separated weak identifiers: an analyst aged 35 in Hanoi using a Redwood X4 smartphone and a home Wi‑Fi router model SeaNet W300 may join diligence calls; such facts are generic and not linked to a name.
Technical logs: session ID AN‑DA‑2026‑07‑03‑1400 and VPN endpoint vn‑hmx‑vpn‑04 may be captured by IT for audit; these do not, by themselves, identify a specific person.
Governance: issuer to convene extraordinary general meeting; board minutes and draft resolutions circulated to VSSA upon request; ticker application “LRF” at SEE‑VN to remain confidential until listing approval; this paragraph contains MNPI until made public.
Governing law and dispute resolution: governed by Vietnamese law; disputes resolved by arbitration at the Saigon Commercial Arbitration Forum (SCAF‑VN), Ho Chi Minh City; Closing targeted for 30 August 2026 subject to customary conditions precedent.
